title: DCMS cyber security newsletter - February 2022
body: "The monthly DCMS cyber security newsletter details the latest announcements, events and projects for people interested in the field of cyber security. This month’s edition includes:   Consultation on the cyber security profession Consultation on new cyber resilience legislation Cyber ASAP funding offer An update to the Cyber Essentials scheme.   You can sign up to receive the newsletter each month directly via email.  To ensure you receive the newsletter in your inbox please mark cybersecurity@dcms.gov.uk as one of your contacts.  If you have any questions please email cybersecurity@dcms.gov.uk.  Further editions of the newsletter can be found on the cyber security newsletter collection page. "
